data.title: Strategy's $72B Bitcoin is held by various custodians, including Coinbase; Fidelity may have 70,000 BTC.
data.description: The $72 billion Bitcoin holdings of Strategy are divided among various undisclosed custodians, with Coinbase being the only one confirmed. Fidelity is believed to potentially possess 70,000 BTC.

data.title: Wendy Luk launches an 8-week program for spiritually minded professionals in Vancouver on July 18, 2025.
data.description: A transformative program spanning eight weeks has been devised to provide spiritual purpose coaching, incorporating quantum healing, intuitive counseling, and soul activations. Tailored for Lightworkers, Starseeds, and mission-focused individuals seeking alignment with their Divine journey, this initiative is set to commence in Vancouver, BC. Scheduled to start on July 18, 2025, the program promises to empower participants through a mix of spiritual practices and holistic guidance, helping them tap into their true potential.

data.title: BSA/AIA, AIANY and AIA|LA released a report on affordable housing, part of a webinar series with BSA/AIA. Event on July 17, 2025.
data.description: A webinar titled "Penciling Out: Financing Solutions for Affordable & Climate Forward Housing" is set to be part of a series on July 17, 2025. Hosted by the Boston Society for Architecture (BSA/AIA), American Institute of Architects New York (AIANY), and AIA Los Angeles (AIA|LA), the event aims to discuss funding options for environmentally-friendly and affordable housing. The collaboration between the three organizations signals a united effort to address the pressing need for sustainable housing solutions. The webinar is expected to attract a large audience interested in innovative financing strategies in the housing sector.

data.title: Monster Energy's UNLEASHED Podcast features BMX athletes Jamie Bestwick and Andy Buckworth at X Games Salt Lake City 2025 in a special live episode. Episode 505 recorded live with Monster Energy showcasing BMX icons.
data.description: In the recent broadcast of Episode 505 of a podcast covering sports and pop culture, the show was recorded live at the X Games Salt Lake City 2025. Taking place in Salt Lake City on July 18, 2025, the event featured special coverage from UNLEASHED and was sponsored by Monster Energy. The episode highlighted two renowned BMX personalities and marked the inaugural X Games event in the city.

data.title: United Airlines to hire more Special Olympics athletes as customer service ambassadors, expanding program to 28 hires across 7 hubs. Jerry Rice joins in recruiting and training.
data.description: A major airline has extended its unique Special Olympics Service Ambassador (SOSA) initiative to three additional locations - Los Angeles, San Francisco, and Newark. This expansion has led to a total of 28 SOSA hires across all seven hubs of the airline. NFL legend Jerry Rice has joined the efforts in San Francisco, aiding in the recruitment and training of current United SOSAs.

data.title: Trump's feud with Powell shines spotlight on National Capital Planning Commission, affecting Federal Reserve chair.
data.description: A key role in the government's efforts to undermine Jerome H. Powell, the Federal Reserve chairman, has been taken up by the National Capital Planning Commission.

data.title: Monthly update on voting rights and shares for VALLOUREC, a French company with a share capital of €4,767,162.72.
data.description: VALLOUREC, a French corporation, operates as a limited liability company with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,767,162.72. The company is headquartered at 12 rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under the number 552 142 200.

data.title: Important updates from Alychlo disclosed in received notification. Keep on the lookout for key information.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow at a rate of 3.5% this year, slightly lower than the previously estimated 3.6%. This decrease is primarily due to challenges faced by emerging markets, including trade tensions and volatility in financial markets. The report also indicated that the unemployment rate is expected to decrease to 5.2% in 2020 from the current rate of 5.4%. Furthermore, it was predicted that inflation will rise to 2.3% this year, up from 2.1% in the previous year. The report highlighted the importance of policy measures to address these economic challenges and promote sustainable growth.

data.title: SKEL hf. completed purchase of shares in Samkaup, with former shareholders receiving 582,548,510 shares in Drangar hf.
data.description: Following a series of press releases from May to July 2025, it was announced that Orkan IS ehf. had fulfilled conditions in the share purchase agreement for acquiring shares in Samkaup hf. Today, Samkaup and Atlaga ehf. completed their merger, alongside the finalization of Orkan's share purchase agreement with former Samkaup shareholders. Shareholders of Samkaup received 582,548,510 shares in Drangar hf., equivalent to a 28.7% stake, in exchange for 98.6% of Samkaup. Other Samkaup shareholders have the option to trade their shares for Drangar shares. Drangar can also redeem the outstanding Samkaup shares as per the Companies Act.
